title: Stage 5 PSA Skip Rate by Technology
description: This is a summary of the skip rate by technology type for each 30-min period, calculated at stage 5 from the post-system actions dataset. 18/11/2025: We have reissued all published datasets to correct a bug that affected the exclusion of long notice units. This is to ensure consistency of published metrics, and doesn't effect a change of the skip rates methodology.
